task_description: Build a complete native Android mobile app (Kotlin + Jetpack Compose) for Mystic Nusa ($MYNU token ecosystem). The app replicates the web platform functionality including: Authentication (Login/Register), Home page with full content, Profile with token history, Claim/Airdrop, News, Stories, 6 Games (Trivia, Logical/IQ, Intuition, Tarot Ritual, Ular Tangga, Ngepet Online), and Staking. Uses dark mystic theme with purple/gold accents, MVVM architecture, Retrofit for API calls, and Navigation Compose.

verification.summary: Both ./gradlew assembleDebug and ./gradlew test pass successfully. 60+ Kotlin source files implementing the complete app. Code review v2 rendered APPROVED verdict after 6 critical fixes were applied.
